query: hey so we just finished migrating our test suite from enzyme to testing-library and I want to make sure claude follows the new patterns. can you write a rule file for our testing conventions? the tests are in packages/web/src/__tests__/
I want to document our API conventions as a .claude/rules file. We use Go with chi router, all handlers return JSON envelope responses, and theres a specific middleware chain order that matters
create coding guidelines for our rust error handling - we use thiserror everywhere and have a strict no-unwrap policy in prod code
we keep getting PRs where claude puts compose previews in the wrong place and uses the wrong theme wrapper. can you look at our existing compose code and write a rule for UI conventions?
write a rule file for dependency injection. our android project uses Hilt but we have some specific conventions around how we scope things and where we put modules that arent obvious
I need to document our networking layer conventions. we use Retrofit with a custom error interceptor and theres a specific way response models should be structured in the data layer
document conventions for how we structure feature modules in this monorepo - each feature has a specific package layout with screen/presenter/state and circuit integration
can you look at our existing test files and create a rules markdown file that captures the patterns? I noticed claude keeps writing tests differently from how we do them
add a rule for our git workflow - we use conventional commits with specific scopes, squash merge only, and PRs need a test plan section
update the existing .claude/rules/testing-unit.md to include our new snapshot testing conventions, we just added it last sprint
write a CLAUDE.md file for this project with build commands and project overview
can you review .claude/rules/architecture.md and tell me if it matches what the code actually does? I think some of it might be outdated
set up eslint with our custom rules for import ordering and naming conventions. heres our .eslintrc that needs updating
create a CONTRIBUTING.md that explains our code review process, branch naming, and how to run tests locally
I need to write unit tests for the UserService class - it has 3 methods that need coverage and we use mockk for mocking
fix the failing test in PaymentHandlerTest.kt - its getting a null pointer on line 47 when trying to verify the mock interaction
add a pre-commit hook that runs ktlint and detekt before allowing commits. put it in .githooks/
set up the CI pipeline in .github/workflows/ci.yml - it should run tests, lint, and build the docker image on PRs to main
can you audit our CLAUDE.md files across all packages and make sure theyre consistent and up to date? some might be missing build commands
refactor the error handling in our payment service - the try-catch blocks are too broad and were swallowing important errors
